Convert files, HTML, and Markdown to PDF: Convert files, HTML, and Markdown to PDF. Office documents (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX), images, web pages, and Markdown become clean PDFs over a simple API.
Your FileToPDF API key (format `sk_live_:
Your FileToPDF API key (format `sk_live_...`).

Get one in seconds: open [filetopdf.dev](https://filetopdf.dev) and click **Get a free API key** on the home page for an instant trial key (no account, 10 free conversions), or create one in the [dashboard](https://filetopdf.dev).
Convert an uploaded file or a public fil: Convert an uploaded file or a public file URL to PDF. The engine is chosen automatically from the extension — Office (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX…), images, HTML, Markdown, or PDF passthrough.
Render a raw HTML string (with optional: Render a raw HTML string (with optional CSS) to PDF using Chromium.
Render a raw Markdown string (with optio: Render a raw Markdown string (with optional CSS) to PDF. A sensible default stylesheet is applied when no CSS is provided.
Read the workspace plan, remaining credi: Read the workspace plan, remaining credits, and subscription status. Free — never consumes credits.
Convert an uploaded file or a public fil: Convert an uploaded file or a public file URL.
Limit output to specific pages, e.g. \"1: Limit output to specific pages, e.g. "1-3" or "2,5-7".
Password to open a protected source docu: Password to open a protected source document (office files only).
Encrypt the resulting PDF; this password: Encrypt the resulting PDF; this password is required to open it.
Restrict editing/printing of the resulti: Restrict editing/printing of the resulting PDF.
Optional CSS, injected into the document: Optional CSS, injected into the document head.
Render scale, e.g. 0.8 to shrink content: Render scale, e.g. 0.8 to shrink content. Default 1.
Optional CSS to style the rendered Markd: Optional CSS to style the rendered Markdown. Overrides the default stylesheet.
